locations.name: East African montane forests
locations.summary: The East African montane forests is a montane tropical moist forest ecoregion of eastern Africa.

locations.name: 伊馬通山脈
locations.summary: 伊馬通山脈是非洲東北部國家南蘇丹的山脈，位於該國東南部東赤道省，距離朱巴約190公里，最高點是海拔高度3,187米的基涅提峰，每年平均降雨量約1,500毫米。

locations.name: 東部弧形山脈
locations.summary: The Eastern Arc Mountains are a chain of mountains found in Kenya and Tanzania.
